name: Patient
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must not trust others fully because they will let me down.
intermediate_belief_depression: Even if I try to change, nothing will be different.
coping_strategies: Avoids emotional vulnerability by pulling away from others.
situation: Colleagues praise a coworker and ask the patient for help with technology issues related to that coworker.
auto_thought: I am not as valued as others, and my efforts will not be recognized.
behavior: Pulls away from emotional connections and avoids expressing needs or desires.
